Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: The course is fundamentally about the legal framework for intellectual property, which is crucial for encouraging innovation and supporting technology development (Targets 9.5, 9.b).

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: The course is a core study of the rule of law (Target 16.3) and legal institutions, focusing on analyzing court decisions and correctly applying law.
